body.purpose: Founder-readable paragraphs, commands, and ledger copy.

label.purpose: Kickers, nav links, artifact labels, and metadata.

shadows.name: command-shadow
shadows.purpose: Install command and primary action surfaces.

shadows.name: ledger-shadow
shadows.purpose: Dark memory panels that represent ordered output.

shadows.name: stack-shadow
shadows.purpose: Large outcome cards and stacked notebook blocks.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Short page-load reveal for major content.

motion.name: ledger-scan
motion.purpose: Subtle scan motion inside the dark memory panel.

motion.name: gravity-inputs
motion.value: Matter.js gravity with static reduced-motion fallback
motion.purpose: Signature motion pattern for messy product inputs.

components.name: Command Copy Button
components.description: Primary install command affordance with terminal icon and hard command shadow.
components.css: .ds-command-button { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; width: 100%; max-width: 35.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-command); background: var(--color-paper); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-mono); text-align: left; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-command) 22%, transparent); transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-command-button:hover { transform: translateY(-0.125rem); } .ds-command-button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-command); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-command-left { display: flex; align-items: center; min-width: 0; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-command-icon { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; color: var(--color-command-deep); flex: 0 0 auto; } .ds-command-button code { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-copy-box { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; flex: 0 0 auto; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ink) 20%, transparent); background: var(--color-command); color: var(--color-ink); } .ds-copy-box svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; }

components.name: Evidence Slip
components.description: Small rotated paper artifact for product inputs and evidence notes.
components.html:
user interviews.csv

Quotes and contradictions
components.css: .ds-evidence-slip { width: min(10.85rem, 44%); border: 1px solid var(--color-ink); background: var(--color-evidence-blue); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 0.72rem; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ink) 14%, transparent); transform: rotate(5deg); } .ds-slip-file { margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--color-ink); } .ds-slip-note { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.45; color: var(--color-muted); }

components.name: Logo Tile
components.description: Logo-only integration artifact, used inside the evidence wall rather than as a logo garden.
components.css: .ds-logo-tile { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.25rem; height: 2.25rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ink) 80%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-paper) 95%, transparent); color: var(--color-command-deep); border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ink) 16%, transparent); transform: rotate(-7deg); } .ds-logo-tile svg { width: 1.35rem; height: 1.35rem; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Small mono navigation with a quiet default state and command-color hover underline.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ink) 74%, transparent); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.72rem; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { border-color: var(--color-command); color: var(--color-ink); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-command); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Ledger Memory Panel
components.description: Dark ordered-output panel for repo-native PM0 memory rows.
components.html:
.pm0 memoryrepo-native
surface

onboarding

what is true now, what changed, what matters
components.css: .ds-ledger { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--color-ink); background: var(--color-ink); color: var(--color-paper); padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 10px 10px 0 var(--color-command); font-family: var(--font-mono); } .ds-ledger-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-paper) 20%, transparent); padding-bottom: 1rem; font-size: 0.75rem; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-paper) 62%, transparent); } .ds-ledger-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 6.5rem 1fr; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-paper) 16%, transparent); } .ds-ledger-row code { color: var(--color-command); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-ledger-row p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-paper); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-ledger-row small { display: block; margin-top: 0.25rem; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-paper) 58%, transparent); font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.45; }

components.name: Gravity Input Card
components.description: Interactive product-input artifact used in the hero gravity scene.
components.html: Support tickets
components.css: .ds-gravity-card { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: fit-content; border: 1px solid var(--color-ink); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-paper) 90%, white); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 rgba(7, 24, 15, 0.2); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-gravity-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; flex: 0 0 auto; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ink) 25%, transparent); background: var(--color-evidence-amber); color: var(--color-ink); } .ds-gravity-icon svg { width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; } .ds-gravity-card span:last-child { margin-inline: 0.75rem; }

narrative.overview:
PM0 should feel like a sharp product operator's notebook left open next to a terminal: tactile, practical, slightly messy, and visibly useful. The surface is a brand landing page for an open-source skill, not a SaaS dashboard. It communicates through paper texture, command affordances, hard-edged artifacts, and evidence becoming order.

The system uses a restrained notebook palette with one clear command accent. Visual energy comes from physical arrangement: gravity cards, rotated slips, ledger grids, line paper, and offset shadows. Do not polish away the mess; make the mess legible.
keyCharacteristics: Square, tactile, paper-first surfaces with visible borders.
Command-line credibility without becoming a developer-only toy.
Scattered product inputs resolving into structured product memory.
Restrained blue command accent, used as evidence and action, not decoration.
Motion is purposeful: gravity, scan lines, and short reveal timing only.

rules.name: The Blue Is A Command Rule
rules.body: Command Blue is for action, source, selection, or evidence. Never spread it across the page as generic brand decoration.

rules.name: The Paper Must Stay Warm Rule
rules.body: Avoid sterile white, cold gray, or pure black. Every neutral should feel like ink or paper, not software chrome.

rules.name: The No Costume Mono Rule
rules.body: Mono is allowed because PM0 is command-native, but it must carry real commands, evidence labels, and artifact text. Do not use mono as generic tech styling.

rules.name: The Big Claim Rule
rules.body: Use Rockwell for claims, not decoration. If the text is not a product-positioning statement, it should usually stay in Geist Mono.

rules.name: The Hard Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are offset blocks, never blurred glow. If a surface starts to look like glassmorphism or generic SaaS elevation, remove the effect.

dos: Do lead with the product loop, not a vague AI promise.
Do make the install command, source access, and open-source nature immediately visible.
Do show scattered product inputs becoming structured product work.
Do keep copy concise, founder-readable, and skeptical of unnecessary process.
Do preserve the gravity-item hero and use it to explain the product.
Do use square borders, hard offset shadows, and warm paper backgrounds.
Do use Command Blue for action, evidence, and source credibility.
donts: Don't make PM0 feel like generic AI SaaS.
Don't make it feel like a heavy enterprise PM suite.
Don't make it a vague AI-hype landing page.
Don't make it look like enterprise workflow software.
Don't use waitlist framing, inflated platform claims, decorative dashboards, or abstract productivity promises.
Don't imply PM0 is a hosted product-management app.
Don't make it feel like a developer-only CLI toy.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradient text, generic rounded card grids, or soft SaaS glow.
Don't replace evidence artifacts with a clean logo garden. Logos must feel thrown into the notebook.
